title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLVII. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Jack in the pulpit, out and in;
        Sold his wife for a minikin pin.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLVII. Love And Matrimony." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
